_comment: Each location has an id (used by story.json to reference it), a display name, and a short description. Add or edit locations here — no code changes needed.

locations.name: Outdoor Amphitheatre
locations.desc: A space for open-air events and performances.

locations.name: Rose Garden
locations.desc: A tranquil outdoor space with flowers and seating.

locations.desc: Learning space that is always open.
